{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ekeri’s Remnant
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ekeri’s Remnant]] is a glowing dragon-spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
